title: biophytum sensitivum var. sesbanioides
intro: Biophytum sensitivum var. sesbanioides, also known as 'Touch-Me-Not' or 'Thermopsis', is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Oxalidaceae. It is a traditional medicinal plant used in various cultures to treat various health conditions, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is known for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory problems. Biophytum sensitivum var. sesbanioides is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and wounds.
